title: Log in and reach the current user profile
description: This test verifies that a valid user can authenticate and see their current profile with the active role reflected in the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the CAPTCHA field with a valid response
Submit the login form
Verify the current user profile is displayed
Verify the active role is displayed

title: Validate an assigned QR and create a journal entry
description: This test verifies that a teacher can complete QR attendance validation and create a journal entry for the assigned class session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the CAPTCHA field with a valid response
Submit the login form
Open the journal attendance page
Scan a valid QR for the assigned room and schedule
Provide valid GPS coordinates within the allowed geofence
Submit the journal validation
Create the journal entry with notes
Verify the journal entry is created
Verify validation status is recorded as passed

title: Lock an account after repeated failed sign-ins
description: This test verifies that repeated invalid password attempts block further access for the account.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Fill in the CAPTCHA field with a valid response
Submit the login form
Repeat the failed sign-in attempt until the account is locked
Attempt to sign in again with the same username and password
Verify a lockout message is displayed
Verify sign in is blocked

title: Validate a scheduled QR attendance scan
description: This test verifies that a teacher can validate a QR attendance attempt for the correct room and time and proceed to journal creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the QR attendance validation entry
Start a QR validation for the assigned room and slot
Verify the QR validation succeeds and the journal creation flow becomes available

title: Log out and end the session
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can log out and no longer access their profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the CAPTCHA field with a valid response
Submit the login form
Open the account menu
Log out of the session
Verify the user is signed out
Verify the current user profile is no longer available

title: Block an unscheduled QR attendance attempt
description: This test verifies that a teacher cannot validate a QR attendance attempt when the room or time does not match the assigned schedule.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the QR attendance validation entry
Start a QR validation for a room or time that does not match the schedule
Verify a schedule mismatch validation error is displayed

title: Create a student record with EMIS-compliant data
description: This test verifies that administrative staff can create a new student record using valid required data.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the CAPTCHA field with a valid response
Submit the login form
Open the student management page
Start creating a new student record
Fill in the required EMIS-compliant student data
Submit the student form
Verify the student record is created
Verify the new student appears in the student list

title: Switch to an allowed role and keep the new session role
description: This test verifies that a permitted user can switch to another role and see that role reflected in their profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the CAPTCHA field with a valid response
Submit the login form
Open the role switching control
Select an allowed alternate role
Confirm the role change
Verify the active role has changed
Verify the current user profile remains available

title: Update school settings successfully
description: An administrator can change school, session, GPS, or SMTP settings and see the saved configuration reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open settings
Change one editable setting to a valid new value
Save the settings
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated settings are shown

title: Create a teaching schedule entry
description: This test verifies that a staff user can create a new teaching schedule entry and see it appear in the schedule list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation entry for schedule management
Start creating a new schedule entry
Fill in the teacher, room, subject, day, and slot fields with valid values
Submit the schedule form
Verify the new schedule entry is displayed in the schedule list

title: Record grades for a class
description: This verifies that a teacher can save valid student grades for a subject and semester and see the saved grade records.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the grade input form
Select a class and subject to grade
Select the current semester
Fill valid scores for the listed students
Submit the grade entry form
Verify saved grade records are displayed

title: View admin system statistics
description: An administrator can open the admin dashboard and see system metrics for users, students, classes, journals, and verifications.

Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the admin dashboard

Verify counts for users, students, classes, journals, and verifications are visible
